requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — TZS CISPR 32 / IEC-Aligned Radiated and Conducted Limits
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容骚扰——TZS CISPR 32 / 与IEC对齐的辐射和传导限值
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容騷擾——TZS CISPR 32 / 與IEC對齊的輻射和傳導限值

summary.en: Wireless and IoT devices exported to Tanzania must comply with Tanzania Bureau of Standards (TBS) EMC emission limits for multimedia equipment, based on TZS standards adopting CISPR 32 (radiated and conducted emissions). TBS coordinates with TCRA for radio equipment EMC compliance. Test reports from TBS-recognised or internationally accredited laboratories (e.g. ILAC MRA member bodies) are accepted as part of the TCRA type approval technical file. The EAC (East African Community) harmonised standards framework also aligns with IEC/CISPR, so compliance with TZS CISPR 32-equivalent limits satisfies EAC regional requirements.
summary.zh: 出口到坦桑尼亚的无线及物联网设备须符合坦桑尼亚标准局（TBS）基于采用CISPR 32（辐射和传导骚扰）的TZS标准制定的多媒体设备电磁兼容骚扰限值。TBS与TCRA协调处理无线电设备电磁兼容合规事宜。TBS认可或国际认可实验室（如ILAC MRA成员机构）出具的测试报告可作为TCRA型式批准技术档案的一部分。东非共同体（EAC）协调标准框架同样与IEC/CISPR对齐，因此符合TZS CISPR 32等同限值即满足EAC区域要求。
summary.zht: 出口到坦尚尼亞的無線及物聯網裝置須符合坦尚尼亞標準局（TBS）基於採用CISPR 32（輻射和傳導騷擾）的TZS標準制定的多媒體設備電磁相容騷擾限值。TBS與TCRA協調處理無線電設備電磁相容合規事宜。TBS認可或國際認可實驗室（如ILAC MRA成員機構）出具的測試報告可作為TCRA型式批准技術檔案的一部分。東非共同體（EAC）協調標準框架同樣與IEC/CISPR對齊，因此符合TZS CISPR 32等同限值即滿足EAC區域要求。

standards_or_laws: TZS — Tanzania Standard adopting CISPR 32 (Multimedia Equipment — Electromagnetic Disturbances)
Tanzania Bureau of Standards (TBS) EMC Certification Scheme
EAC Harmonised Standards — IEC/CISPR aligned EMC emissions

summary.en: China's EMC emission limits for information technology and multimedia equipment are covered by GB 9254 (adopting CISPR 32) under the CCC mandatory certification scheme and voluntary GB/T standards. Test reports from CNCA-accredited laboratories demonstrate China-domestic compliance. Because TZS adopts CISPR 32 similarly, the underlying technical limits are largely aligned; however, Chinese CCC test reports under GB 9254 are not automatically accepted by TBS and must be re-tested or assessed by a TBS-recognised laboratory for Tanzania market entry.
summary.zh: 中国信息技术和多媒体设备电磁兼容骚扰限值由CCC强制认证体系下的GB 9254（采用CISPR 32）及自愿性GB/T标准覆盖。CNCA认可实验室出具的测试报告证明中国境内合规。由于TZS同样采用CISPR 32，底层技术限值基本对齐；但中国GB 9254下的CCC测试报告不被TBS自动接受，须经TBS认可实验室重新测试或评定方可进入坦桑尼亚市场。
summary.zht: 中國資訊技術和多媒體設備電磁相容騷擾限值由CCC強制認證體系下的GB 9254（採用CISPR 32）及自願性GB/T標準覆蓋。CNCA認可實驗室出具的測試報告證明中國境內合規。由於TZS同樣採用CISPR 32，底層技術限值基本對齊；但中國GB 9254下的CCC測試報告不被TBS自動接受，須經TBS認可實驗室重新測試或評定方可進入坦尚尼亞市場。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254 — Information Technology Equipment EMC Emissions (China, adopting CISPR 32)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — EMC emissions for IT and multimedia equipment (China)

gap.en: CCC test reports under GB 9254 are not automatically accepted by TBS for Tanzania market entry. Although the underlying CISPR 32 technical limits are broadly aligned, separate testing by a TBS-recognised or ILAC MRA-accredited laboratory is required, and the resulting test report must be submitted as part of the TCRA type approval technical file.
gap.zh: 中国GB 9254下的CCC测试报告不被TBS自动接受用于进入坦桑尼亚市场。尽管底层CISPR 32技术限值基本对齐，仍须由TBS认可或ILAC MRA认可的实验室进行单独测试，所得测试报告须作为TCRA型式批准技术档案的一部分提交。
gap.zht: 中國GB 9254下的CCC測試報告不被TBS自動接受用於進入坦尚尼亞市場。儘管底層CISPR 32技術限值基本對齊，仍須由TBS認可或ILAC MRA認可的實驗室進行單獨測試，所得測試報告須作為TCRA型式批准技術檔案的一部分提交。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC emissions compliance under TZS standards adopting CISPR 32 is required for wireless and IoT devices entering Tanzania. Chinese CCC test reports under GB 9254 are not automatically recognised by TBS. Testing by a TBS-recognised or ILAC MRA-accredited laboratory is required, and test evidence must be included in the TCRA type approval technical file submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入坦桑尼亚的无线及物联网设备须符合采用CISPR 32的TZS标准下的电磁兼容骚扰要求。中国GB 9254下的CCC测试报告不被TBS自动认可。须由TBS认可或ILAC MRA认可的实验室进行测试，测试证据须纳入TCRA型式批准技术档案提交材料。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入坦尚尼亞的無線及物聯網裝置須符合採用CISPR 32的TZS標準下的電磁相容騷擾要求。中國GB 9254下的CCC測試報告不被TBS自動認可。須由TBS認可或ILAC MRA認可的實驗室進行測試，測試證據須納入TCRA型式批准技術檔案提交材料。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Immunity — TZS IEC 61000 Series / EAC Harmonised Immunity Limits
requirement_topic.zh: 电磁兼容抗扰度——TZS IEC 61000系列 / 东非共同体协调抗扰度限值
requirement_topic.zht: 電磁相容抗擾度——TZS IEC 61000系列 / 東非共同體協調抗擾度限值

summary.en: Wireless and IoT devices for the Tanzania market must demonstrate EMC immunity against electrostatic discharge (ESD), fast transients (EFT/burst), conducted and radiated RF fields, voltage dips, and surges in line with TZS standards adopting the IEC 61000 series (e.g. TZS IEC 61000-4-2 for ESD, TZS IEC 61000-4-3 for radiated immunity, TZS IEC 61000-4-4 for EFT/burst, TZS IEC 61000-4-5 for surges). EAC harmonised standards align with IEC 61000 across the East African Community. TBS or a TBS-recognised internationally accredited laboratory must conduct immunity testing, and results are submitted in the TCRA type approval technical file.
summary.zh: 进入坦桑尼亚市场的无线及物联网设备须依据采用IEC 61000系列的TZS标准（如TZS IEC 61000-4-2静电放电、TZS IEC 61000-4-3辐射抗扰度、TZS IEC 61000-4-4电快速瞬变/脉冲群、TZS IEC 61000-4-5浪涌），证明其对静电放电、快速瞬变（EFT/脉冲群）、传导及辐射射频场、电压暂降和浪涌的电磁兼容抗扰能力。东非共同体协调标准与整个东非共同体的IEC 61000对齐。须由TBS或TBS认可的国际认可实验室进行抗扰度测试，结果须提交至TCRA型式批准技术档案。
summary.zht: 進入坦尚尼亞市場的無線及物聯網裝置須依據採用IEC 61000系列的TZS標準（如TZS IEC 61000-4-2靜電放電、TZS IEC 61000-4-3輻射抗擾度、TZS IEC 61000-4-4電快速瞬變/脈衝群、TZS IEC 61000-4-5浪湧），證明其對靜電放電、快速瞬變（EFT/脈衝群）、傳導及輻射射頻場、電壓暫降和浪湧的電磁相容抗擾能力。東非共同體協調標準與整個東非共同體的IEC 61000對齊。須由TBS或TBS認可的國際認可實驗室進行抗擾度測試，結果須提交至TCRA型式批准技術檔案。

standards_or_laws: TZS IEC 61000-4-2 — Electrostatic Discharge Immunity (Tanzania Standard, adopting IEC 61000-4-2)
TZS IEC 61000-4-3 — Radiated RF Electromagnetic Field Immunity (Tanzania Standard, adopting IEC 61000-4-3)
TZS IEC 61000-4-4 — EFT/Burst Immunity (Tanzania Standard, adopting IEC 61000-4-4)
TZS IEC 61000-4-5 — Surge Immunity (Tanzania Standard, adopting IEC 61000-4-5)
EAC Harmonised Standards — IEC 61000 series immunity

summary.en: China's EMC immunity requirements for IT and multimedia equipment are covered by GB/T 17626 series (adopting IEC 61000-4-x) under the CCC scheme and voluntary testing frameworks. CNCA-accredited laboratory test reports cover China-domestic compliance. Because TZS adopts IEC 61000-4-x similarly, the underlying technical immunity levels are broadly aligned; however, Chinese CCC immunity test reports under GB/T 17626 are not automatically accepted by TBS and must be re-tested or assessed by a TBS-recognised laboratory for Tanzania market entry.
summary.zh: 中国IT和多媒体设备电磁兼容抗扰度要求由CCC体系及自愿性测试框架下的GB/T 17626系列（采用IEC 61000-4-x）覆盖。CNCA认可实验室测试报告涵盖中国境内合规。由于TZS同样采用IEC 61000-4-x，底层技术抗扰度等级基本对齐；但中国GB/T 17626下的CCC抗扰度测试报告不被TBS自动接受，须经TBS认可实验室重新测试或评定方可进入坦桑尼亚市场。
summary.zht: 中國IT和多媒體設備電磁相容抗擾度要求由CCC體系及自願性測試框架下的GB/T 17626系列（採用IEC 61000-4-x）覆蓋。CNCA認可實驗室測試報告涵蓋中國境內合規。由於TZS同樣採用IEC 61000-4-x，底層技術抗擾度等級基本對齊；但中國GB/T 17626下的CCC抗擾度測試報告不被TBS自動接受，須經TBS認可實驗室重新測試或評定方可進入坦尚尼亞市場。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17626 series — EMC Immunity Tests (China, adopting IEC 61000-4-x series)
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) — EMC immunity for IT and multimedia equipment (China)

gap.en: CCC immunity test reports under GB/T 17626 are not automatically recognised by TBS for Tanzania market entry. Although the underlying IEC 61000-4-x technical immunity levels are broadly aligned, separate immunity testing by a TBS-recognised or ILAC MRA-accredited laboratory is required, and test results must be submitted as part of the TCRA type approval technical file.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 17626下的CCC抗扰度测试报告不被TBS自动认可用于进入坦桑尼亚市场。尽管底层IEC 61000-4-x技术抗扰度等级基本对齐，仍须由TBS认可或ILAC MRA认可的实验室进行单独抗扰度测试，测试结果须作为TCRA型式批准技术档案的一部分提交。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 17626下的CCC抗擾度測試報告不被TBS自動認可用於進入坦尚尼亞市場。儘管底層IEC 61000-4-x技術抗擾度等級基本對齊，仍須由TBS認可或ILAC MRA認可的實驗室進行單獨抗擾度測試，測試結果須作為TCRA型式批准技術檔案的一部分提交。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC immunity compliance under TZS IEC 61000-4-x series standards is required for wireless and IoT devices entering Tanzania. Chinese CCC immunity test reports under GB/T 17626 are not automatically recognised by TBS. Testing by a TBS-recognised or ILAC MRA-accredited laboratory is required, and immunity test results must be included in the TCRA type approval technical file submission.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入坦桑尼亚的无线及物联网设备须符合TZS IEC 61000-4-x系列标准下的电磁兼容抗扰度要求。中国GB/T 17626下的CCC抗扰度测试报告不被TBS自动认可。须由TBS认可或ILAC MRA认可的实验室进行测试，抗扰度测试结果须纳入TCRA型式批准技术档案提交材料。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入坦尚尼亞的無線及物聯網裝置須符合TZS IEC 61000-4-x系列標準下的電磁相容抗擾度要求。中國GB/T 17626下的CCC抗擾度測試報告不被TBS自動認可。須由TBS認可或ILAC MRA認可的實驗室進行測試，抗擾度測試結果須納入TCRA型式批准技術檔案提交材料。
